query: Map our business goals to user psychology — build the trigger map with a primary goal, personas, and their wants and fears.
Run the Phase 2 effect-mapping / trigger-mapping workshop and produce the trigger-map.md with driving forces per persona.
Connect FreshBox's business goals to the personas' driving forces (positive and negative) and prioritize them.
Write the strategic product brief with vision, positioning and success criteria before we map anything.
Turn the trigger map into linear sunshine-path UX scenario outlines that expose every page.
Write the detailed page specification for the checkout screen — content, interactions, spacing and typography.
